name: tech-priests
title: Tech Priests
author: christopher vardeman
description: Tech-Priest logistics drones, Cogitator Stations, Work State tabs, Machine-Spirit ledger traits, emergency machinery, technology-gated infrastructure planning, station-owned defense perimeters, hidden proxy-gun ammo hardening, physical direct-acquisition target guarding, and 0.1.650 direct resource target/movement locking so declared acquisition targets stay bound while priests walk to mine them.
